title: Twitter @n0riskn0r3ward
summary: Seems given limited budget - if you want to train an SOTA retrieval model from scratch your best bet is to take some bonkers large, SOTA LLM decoder, convert it to an encoder with something like the LLM2Vec approach. And then distill that into something smaller... https://t.co/d74HxlPulZ
